svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 19px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #172033;
display: inline-block; font-size: 24px; font-family: "Arial"; color: light-dark(#172033, #e8edf7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 47px; margin-left: 2px;

div.div: Four compact entity tables; only the real scraped-job relationship is connected.
